name: I'm on Hickory Ave
hints: Hickory Ave with a shed that has an antenna on it. The shed looks like it contains radio equipment.
GO SHED to enter the radio shed. The antenna is important for transmitting.
GO SHED enters the radio equipment shed (room 13) which is critical for the endgame transmission. EAST returns to Main & Hickory (room 3). WEST to the west cul-de-sac (room 15).
notes: Hickory Ave with the antenna shed. GO SHED enters the radio equipment shed (room 13) - critical for endgame TRANSMIT YOYODYNE to deactivate the bomb. EAST to Main & Hickory (room 3). WEST to west cul-de-sac (room 15).
